MINI MINUTES: Stipulated Motion to Mediate Case in Lieu of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date set on 7/26/2004 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court ordered a Mediation Compliance OSC set on 4/28/2004 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212.
